problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Combining Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
